_comment: GUI config for the new Steam Controller (2025, v2). Its buttons/axes match the Steam Deck (so the buttons/axes lists mirror deck.config.json), but it uses its own traced background image controller-images/sc2.svg and its own face-button glyphs (button-images/sc2_*.svg) and side-panel icons (images/sc2/*.svg), all generated by tools/gen_sc2_image.py from tools/sc2-source.svg.
